# Mattress Rank

> Mattress reviews, rankings, and buying guides

## Categories

- [Memory Foam](/category/memory-foam): Pressure relief mattresses
- [Hybrid Mattresses](/category/hybrid-mattresses): Spring and foam combination
- [Innerspring](/category/innerspring): Traditional coil mattresses
- [Latex Mattresses](/category/latex-mattresses): Natural and eco-friendly
- [Budget Mattresses](/category/budget-mattresses): Affordable options under $500

## Comparison Guides

- [Best Mattresses for Back Pain](/best/best-mattresses-for-back-pain)
- [Best Budget Mattresses 2026](/best/best-budget-mattresses-2026)
- [Best Cooling Mattresses for Hot Sleepers](/best/best-cooling-mattresses-for-hot-sleepers)

## Key Facts

- 12 tools reviewed and compared
- 5 categories covering all types
- 3 in-depth comparison guides
- Updated March 2026
- Independent reviews — not sponsored
